Description: PLP loads with at least one product card visible
Steps: 1. Open a valid PLP URL
Expected Result: Category heading visible; at least one product card rendered; no broken layout.
Notes: Skechers SPA: cards require JS hydration — see PL-skx-001

Description: Clicking a product card navigates to that product's PDP
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Click first product card (image or name)
Expected Result: URL changes to the product's PDP path; PDP loads correctly.

Description: Quick Add adds an in-stock product to cart from PLP
Preconditions: Quick Add enabled; in-stock configurable product on PLP
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Click Quick Add on a product 3. Select required size/variant 4. Click Add to Cart/Bag
Expected Result: Header cart count increments; product appears in mini-cart or cart.

Description: Applying a single filter updates the product list
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Select one filter option (e.g. a colour)
Expected Result: Product list updates to show only products matching the selected filter.

Description: Applying multiple filters narrows the product list to combined criteria
Preconditions: PLP loaded; multiple filter options available
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Select one filter 3. Select a second filter from another facet
Expected Result: Product count decreases; products shown match all selected filters.

Description: Clear All filters restores the unfiltered product list
Steps: 1. Apply a filter 2. Click Clear All
Expected Result: All active filter chips removed; product list resets to unfiltered state.

Description: Product card shows image + name + price
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Inspect first product card
Expected Result: Product image (not broken), product name, and price all visible and non-empty.

Description: Sorting by price low-to-high reorders products
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Select Price: Low to High sort option
Expected Result: Products reorder with the lowest-priced item appearing first.

Description: Load More / next page loads additional products without duplicates
Preconditions: PLP has more products than first page
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Scroll to bottom 3. Click Load More or next page
Expected Result: Additional product cards appear; no duplicate cards; total count increases.

Description: Active filter chip visible; removing it updates the product list
Steps: 1. Apply a filter 2. Verify active chip is shown 3. Click the chip to remove it
Expected Result: Active chip disappears; product list expands back to reflect removed filter.

Description: Quick Add opens size/variant selector before ATC for a configurable product
Preconditions: Quick Add enabled; configurable product (size required) on PLP
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Click Quick Add on a configurable product
Expected Result: Size/variant selector panel or modal opens; product NOT yet added to cart.

Description: Mobile filter panel opens and applying a filter updates the product list
Steps: 1. Open PLP on mobile 2. Tap filter button 3. Select a filter 4. Apply
Expected Result: Filter panel opens; product list updates to match selected filter.

Description: Sale product card shows original and discounted price
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Locate a sale product card 3. Inspect price area
Expected Result: Both original (struck-through) and sale price visible on card.
Notes: @data-dependent — sale product may not be available at all times

Description: Breadcrumb visible and category link navigates to parent category or homepage
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Observe breadcrumb 3. Click parent category crumb
Expected Result: URL changes to parent category or homepage; page loads correctly.

Description: OOS product card displays correct unavailable state
Preconditions: PLP contains at least one OOS product
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Identify OOS product card
Expected Result: OOS card is visually distinguished (badge/label/disabled Quick Add); Quick Add cannot proceed.

Description: Wishlist icon is visible on each product card
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Inspect product cards
Expected Result: Wishlist icon/heart button visible on product cards.

Description: Sorting by price high-to-low reorders products in descending order
Steps: 1. Open PLP 2. Select Price: High to Low
Expected Result: Products reorder with highest-priced item appearing first.

Description: Applying a zero-result filter shows an empty state
Preconditions: PLP loaded; a filter combination yields zero products
Steps: 1. Apply filter combination that returns no products
Expected Result: Empty state message shown; no product cards visible; no layout break.

Description: Filter panel opens and closes correctly on desktop
Steps: 1. Open PLP on desktop 2. Open filter panel/sidebar 3. Close it
Expected Result: Filter panel opens and collapses cleanly without page break.

Description: Clicking a product card fires a dataLayer product-click event
Steps: 1. Intercept dataLayer.push 2. Click product card 3. Read captured events
Expected Result: At least one event matching /select_item|product_click|list_click/i captured.
Notes: Partial — event fires verified; payload schema not validated

Description: Skechers PLP product cards are visible after JS hydration (SPA)
Steps: 1. Open Skechers PLP 2. Wait for product cards to render (poll on card selector via waitForFunction)
Expected Result: At least one product card visible; not stuck in loading state; no timeout.
Notes: Skechers is a pure SPA — cards NOT available at domcontentloaded; requires waitForFunction polling on the custom hashed-class selectors
